title: koeleria transsilvanica subsp. tenuipes
intro: Koeleria transsilvanica subsp. tenuipes is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Koeleria transsilvanica subsp. tenuipes include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
